Interface IUtilityNetworkRule

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a utility network rule.

[Guid("CFDB1151-19F8-4FD3-91D6-C8971C51C426")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUtilityNetworkRule

Properties

ID

Returns the ID.

int ID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Type

Returns the type.

esriUtilityNetworkRuleType Type { get; }

Property Value

esriUtilityNetworkRuleType

GetRuleInfo(out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int)

Returns the rule info.
